seo_questions.tr: İmam el-Bâkır, Hasan el-Basrî'nin ilim gizleyenler hakkındaki iddiasına nasıl cevap verdi?
seo_questions.ur: امام باقر علیہ السلام نے علم چھپانے والوں کے بارے میں حسن بصری کے دعوے کا کیا جواب دیا؟
seo_questions.zh: 伊玛目·巴基尔对哈桑·巴士里关于隐藏知识者的说法有何回应？

similar_content_hints.description: Hadiths in al-Kafi and Bihar al-Anwar where Imam al-Baqir (AS) or Imam al-Sadiq (AS) invoke the Believer of Pharaoh's household (Quran 40:28) as a Quranic precedent justifying taqiyya (religious dissimulation) as a noble and historically rooted practice.
Hadiths asserting that the Ahl al-Bayt are the sole and exclusive repository of true Islamic knowledge, and that religious knowledge sought outside of them will not be found or will be erroneous.

Hadiths in which Shia Imams directly critique or dismiss the rulings and opinions of prominent non-Shia scholars such as al-Hasan al-Basri, Abu Hanifa, or Sufyan al-Thawri, pointing to the inadequacy of their knowledge compared to that of the Ahl al-Bayt.

summaries.bn: ইমাম আল-বাকির (আ.) হাসান আল-বসরির দাবিকে খণ্ডন করেন। ফিরআউনের পরিবারের মুমিনের (কুরআন ৪০:২৮) দৃষ্টান্ত দিয়ে ইমাম প্রমাণ করেন যে জ্ঞান গোপন রাখা নবী নূহ (আ.)-এর সময় থেকেই চলে আসছে এবং ঘোষণা করেন যে প্রকৃত জ্ঞান কেবল আহলুল বাইতের কাছেই পাওয়া যায়।
summaries.de: Imam al-Baqir (AS) widerlegt al-Hasan al-Basris Behauptung mit einem Reductio-ad-absurdum-Argument: Wäre das Verbergen von Wissen strafwürdig, wäre auch der Gläubige aus dem Volk des Pharao (Quran 40:28), der seinen Glauben verbarg, verdammt. Der Imam betont, dass das Wissen seit der Zeit des Propheten Noah (AS) stets verborgen war, und erklärt, dass wahres Wissen nur bei den Ahl al-Bayt zu finden ist.
summaries.en: Imam al-Baqir (AS) refutes al-Hasan al-Basri's claim that those who conceal knowledge will torment the inhabitants of Hell with foul odors, deploying a reductio ad absurdum: if that were true, the celebrated Believer of Pharaoh's household (Quran 40:28), who concealed his faith to protect Prophet Moses (AS), would also be condemned. The Imam then declares that knowledge has always been concealed since the time of Noah (AS), and concludes definitively that true knowledge resides only with the Ahl al-Bayt — pointing to himself.
summaries.es: El Imam al-Baqir (AS) refuta la afirmación de al-Hasan al-Basri mediante un argumento ad absurdum: si ocultar el conocimiento fuera punible, el Creyente del pueblo del Faraón (Corán 40:28), quien ocultó su fe, también habría perecido. El Imam señala que el conocimiento ha estado siempre oculto desde el tiempo del Profeta Noé (AS) y declara que el verdadero conocimiento únicamente se halla con los Ahl al-Bayt.
summaries.fa: امام باقر (علیه السلام) ادعای حسن بصری را که پنهان‌کنندگان علم اهل جهنم را با بوی شکم آزار می‌دهند با استدلال منطقی رد می‌کند: اگر این ادعا درست بود، مومن آل فرعون (قرآن ۴۰:۲۸) که ایمانش را پنهان کرد نیز هلاک می‌شد. سپس امام اعلام می‌فرماید که علم از زمان حضرت نوح (ع) همواره پنهان بوده و علم حقیقی فقط نزد اهل بیت است.
summaries.fr: L'Imam al-Baqir (AS) réfute l'affirmation d'al-Hasan al-Basrî par un raisonnement par l'absurde : si dissimuler le savoir était punissable, le Croyant du peuple du Pharaon (Coran 40:28), qui cacha sa foi, aurait lui aussi péri. L'Imam souligne que la dissimulation du savoir a toujours existé depuis le Prophète Noé (AS) et déclare que le vrai savoir ne se trouve qu'auprès des Ahl al-Bayt.
summaries.id: Imam al-Baqir (AS) membantah klaim al-Hasan al-Bashri bahwa penyembunyi ilmu akan menyiksa penghuni neraka dengan bau busuk. Imam menggunakan argumen reductio ad absurdum dengan menyebut mukmin dari keluarga Firaun (Al-Quran 40:28) yang menyembunyikan imannya, lalu menegaskan bahwa penyembunyian ilmu telah terjadi sejak Nabi Nuh (AS) dan bahwa ilmu sejati hanya ada pada Ahlulbait.
summaries.ru: Имам аль-Бакир (AS) опровергает аль-Хасана аль-Басри аргументом от абсурда: если бы сокрытие знания было наказуемо, то и верующий из рода Фараона (Коран 40:28), скрывавший свою веру, погиб бы. Имам указывает, что знание было скрыто с самых времён пророка Нуха (AS), и заявляет, что истинное знание находится только у Ахл аль-Байт.
summaries.tr: İmam el-Bâkır (AS), Hasan el-Basrî'nin 'ilmi gizleyenler cehennem ehlini kötü kokuyla rahatsız edecek' iddiasını mantıksal bir absürtlükle çürütmektedir: Bu doğru olsaydı, imanını gizleyen Firavun ailesinin mümini (Kur'an 40:28) de helâk olurdu. Ardından Imam, Hz. Nuh'tan bu yana ilmin hep gizlendiğini vurgular ve gerçek ilmin yalnızca Ehl-i Beyt'te bulunduğunu ilan eder.
summaries.ur: امام باقر علیہ السلام نے حسن بصری کے اس دعوے کو رد کیا کہ علم چھپانے والے جہنمیوں کو بدبو سے اذیت دیں گے۔ امام نے آل فرعون کے مومن (قرآن ۴۰:۲۸) کی مثال دی جس نے اپنا ایمان چھپایا — یہ ثابت کرتے ہوئے کہ علم کی پوشیدگی حضرت نوح علیہ السلام کے زمانے سے چلی آ رہی ہے — اور اعلان فرمایا کہ حقیقی علم صرف اہل بیت کے پاس ہے۔
summaries.zh: 伊玛目·巴基尔（愿主赐其平安）以归谬法驳斥哈桑·巴士里的说法：若隐藏知识当受惩处，那么隐藏信仰的法老族中信士（《古兰经》40:28）也必定灭亡——此论显然荒谬。伊玛目进而指出，自努哈先知时代起知识便一直被隐藏，并宣告真正的知识只存于圣裔之家。

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (172/ 1)
Shaykh Baqir al-Behbudi: ضعيف - Sahih al-Kafi
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ وَ عِنْدَهُ رَجُلٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْبَصْرَةِ يُقَالُ لَهُ عُثْمَانُ الْأَعْمَى وَ هُوَ يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْحَسَنَ الْبَصْرِيَّ يَزْعُمُ أَنَّ الَّذِينَ يَكْتُمُونَ الْعِلْمَ يُؤْذِي رِيحُ بُطُونِهِمْ أَهْلَ النَّارِ فَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَهَلَكَ إِذَنْ مُؤْمِنُ آلِ فِرْعَوْنَ مَا زَالَ الْعِلْمُ مَكْتُوماً مُنْذُ بَعَثَ اللَّهُ نُوحاً ( عليه السلام ) فَلْيَذْهَبِ الْحَسَنُ يَمِيناً وَ شِمَالًا فَوَ اللَّهِ مَا يُوجَدُ الْعِلْمُ إِلَّا هَاهُنَا .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washha, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abdullah Bin Suleyman who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying, and in his<sup>asws</sup> presence was a man from the people of Al-Basra called Usman the blind one, and he was saying, ‘Al-Hassan Al-Basry is alleging that those who are concealing the knowledge would be harming the inhabitants of the Fire by a wind of their bellies’. So Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So, destroyed then, is the Believer of the people of the Pharaoh<sup>la</sup>. The knowledge has not ceased to be concealed since Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Sent Noah<sup>as</sup>. Therefore, let Al-Hassan (Al-Basry) go right and left, for by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, he would not find the knowledge except over here’.
en.sarwar: 15. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from ‘Abdallah ibn Sulayman who has said the following. ‘(Imam) abu Ja‘far (a.s.) said to a man from Basra called ‘Uthman al-A’ma who would keep saying, “Al-Hassan al-Basri believes that those who hide knowledge the bad odor from their stomach will cause suffering to the people of hell.” The Imam said, “The true believer of the people of Pharaoh is then destroyed. Knowledge from the time of Noah became veiled (s.a). Let Hassan go left and right. I swear by Allah he will not find knowledge in no other place but here with us.”
